ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., Flat, Studio, Mews house) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the property type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property type is active and can be used in new listings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_metrics" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "distribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage distribution of the property type in the region */,
  "avg_current_value" REAL /* Average current value of the property type */,
  "avg_beds" REAL /* Average number of bedrooms in the property type */,
  "avg_bathrooms" REAL /* Average number of bathrooms in the property type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "total_properties" INTEGER /* Total number of properties of this type in the region */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the properties of this type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the properties of this type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the properties of this type */,
  "std_dev_value" REAL /* Standard deviation of the property values */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id", "year", "month")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., City Center, Suburbs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the property is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "year_built" TEXT /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., available, sold, under contract) */,
  "property_area" REAL /* Area of the property in square meters */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property is featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the image is the primary image for the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Swimming pool, Garage) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_icon" TEXT /* Icon to represent the feature in UI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Sales, Marketing, Finance) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, sell) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer (if applicable) */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the buyer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the buyer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the seller record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the seller record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)
